title: BTA Spawn Eggs
description: A backport of modern Minecraft's spawn eggs for Better Than Adventure (A heavily modified version of beta 1.7.3)
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!_

For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.

# About

Spawn Eggs adds... Spawn eggs to BTA! They work nearly the same as the ones found in modern Minecraft. You can press middle mouse button to "pick block" entities to recieve their egg in creative. Using a spawn egg on a monster spawner sets the spawner to spawn the mob from the egg!

Adds 19 spawn eggs for:
- Squid
- Wolf
- Zombie
- Scorpion
- Snowman
- Zombie Pigman
- Armored Zombie
- Player (player look alike mob)
- Giant
- Firefly
- Spider
- Slime
- Skeleton
- Sheep
- Pig
- Ghast
- Creeper
- Cow
- Chicken

# Installation
This mod needs a specific [MultiMC/Prism](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo) instance to run and other mods as a dependencies:
- [HalpLibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe) by Turnip Labs
- [PrismaticLibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/prismaticlibe)

# Credits
